title: NOMOS Execution Response
description: Response body from POST /api/v1/verify — the verdict returned after evaluating a decision context

verdict.description: The enforcement outcome. 'proceed' = ALLOW, 'escalate' = ESCALATE, 'deny' = DENY.

allowed.description: True if verdict is 'proceed', false otherwise. Convenience field.

outcome.description: Optional machine-readable label describing the specific outcome (e.g. 'auto_approved', 'manual_review_required'). Derived from matched rule metadata.

rule.description: ID of the primary rule that determined the verdict.

rule_description.description: Natural-language text of the matched rule, verbatim from the artifact.

matched_rules.description: IDs of all rules that matched the context. May contain more than one entry in collect_and_resolve mode.

artifact_id.description: ID of the artifact that was evaluated.

artifact_version.description: Version of the artifact that was evaluated.

confidence.description: Confidence tier of the evaluated artifact.

request_id.description: Echo of the request_id from the execution request.

ts.description: ISO 8601 UTC timestamp of verdict emission.

audit_hash.description: Hash-chain value linking this verdict to the previous verdict for this artifact. SHA-256 of (previous_audit_hash || request_id || verdict || ts).

contradictions.description: Number of contradictions present in the evaluated artifact. Surfaced on every response per §9.1.

reason.description: Present when verdict is 'escalate' due to a system condition rather than a rule match (e.g. 'missing_context_field', 'guard_constraint_violated', 'unknown_agent').

replay.description: Present and true when the execution used a caller-supplied execution_at timestamp. Absent on live executions. NOMOS-SPEC-003 §8.

execution_at.description: Echo of the execution_at value from the request. Present only when replay: true. NOMOS-SPEC-003 §8.

expired_rules.description: IDs of rules that were skipped due to temporal bounds at the execution instant. Present when at least one rule was expired. NOMOS-SPEC-003 §5.

staleness_advisory.description: Passive advisory emitted when decisions since last triangulation exceed the staleness threshold. Never affects verdict. NOMOS-SPEC-003 §6.

triangulated_at.description: ISO 8601 UTC timestamp of the last triangulation run.

decisions_since_triangulation.description: Number of executions against this artifact since the triangulation baseline was recorded.

threshold.description: The staleness threshold that was exceeded.

examples.rule_description: Automatic approval when credit_score >= 720 and income_to_repayment_ratio >= 2.5
Applications with credit_score < 720 require human officer review before approval
